goal: Orun TUI cockpit roadmap and open PR verification
notes: Task 0146.1 verified PASS and merged PR #145 at 5beb334 (2026-05-29). Plan Studio Phase 2 slice landed on main. Repo health stays green.

Durable outcome on main: LiveOrunService.GeneratePlan calls Orun internals directly (loader/composition/trigger/expand/planner/render) — no shell-out from internal/tui. PlanStudioModel has Idle/Configuring/Generating/Review/Saved/Error state machine with cursor nav, generate (g) / save (s) / clear (c) bindings. Root model routes services.PlanGeneratedMsg and PlanStudioSaveRequestedMsg, mode-switches p/b/h. Save reuses GeneratePlan with NamedPlan for byte-identical persisted plan. NamedPlan nil-store path emits a clear warning. Property tests (pgregory.net/rapid) cover state-set invariants and deterministic rendering.
